steps.title: Meet Up with Team
steps.text: Hello explorer, use the tool to navigate to the meetup point within 20 meters.

steps.title: Track the Wolf Scent
steps.text: The hunter's transmitter is active. Use only the bearing to find the wolf. Reach within 20 meters of the signal.

steps.title: Leave the Area
steps.text: Static interference! Move at least 50 meters away from the wolf's location to avoid jamming.

steps.title: Activate EMP
steps.text: That's not a wolf! It's a drone. Hurry to the designated point within 20 meters and radio in to activate the EMP. Time limit: 8 minutes.

steps.title: Escape EMP Blast
steps.text: EMP activated! Get at least 50 meters away from the blast zone immediately! Time limit: 3 minutes.

steps.title: Mission Success
steps.text: Good job! We disabled the drone. It's only a matter of time before we find the owner.

steps.title: Mission Failed - EMP Not Activated
steps.text: Dammit it escaped! We will just have to wait for it next time.

steps.title: Mission Failed - Radio Knocked Out
steps.text: The radio was knocked out. Without it you are unable to contact the team...or capture the wolf.
